title: anthoxanthum nitens subsp. kolymense
intro: Anthoxanthum nitens subsp. kolymense, also known as Kolyma sweetgrass, is a subspecies of the Anthoxanthum nitens plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Kolyma sweetgrass include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Kolyma sweetgrass can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in various traditional medicine practices.
